header.title: Elevate Your Tech Business with the power of media and technologies

home.title: JY Tech
home.mission: Our mission is to revolutionize the intersection of technology and commerce, delivering seamless digital experiences that drive growth, enhance consumer engagement, and streamline financial transactions.

business.title: Unlock New Business Opportunities
business.description: We believe that innovation and collaboration are key to unlocking new potential. Whether you're an entrepreneur looking for a fresh partnership or a seasoned business professional seeking to expand your portfolio, we offer a wide range of opportunities to help you grow and succeed.
business.bannerTitle: Welcome to the Global Business Center!
business.bannerDescription: Empowering Global Business Growth! With strategic connections to over 1,000 leading organizations and partners worldwide, we manage and deliver exceptional results on more than 100 cases annually. Our expertise and expansive network enable us to drive sustainable success for businesses on a global scale.

technology.name: Technology
technology.description: We provide tech solutions covering international business including AI, IoT, FinTech, EdTech and etc.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: We help businesses grow through digital marketing, branding, and customer engagement strategies.

businessService.name: Business
businessService.description: We help global businesses grow by connecting with over 1,000 organizations and partners worldwide, successfully handling more than 100 cases each year.

consulting.name: Consulting
consulting.description: Expert guidance and solutions for your business challenges and growth opportunities.

pricing.title: Pricing & Solutions
pricing.subtitle: Explore our pricing options and past successful projects

websiteSolutions.title: AI-Powered Solutions
websiteSolutions.subtitle: AI-driven end-to-end solutions tailored to your business scenario
websiteSolutions.priceNote: Prices listed are starting points. Contact our sales team for a detailed quote.

hiring.title: Join Our Team
hiring.subtitle: We're looking for talented people who are passionate about technology and innovation. Start your journey with JY Tech today.

innovation.title: Innovation First
innovation.description: Work on cutting-edge projects spanning AI, IoT, FinTech, and more. We embrace new ideas and technologies.

growth.title: Career Growth
growth.description: We invest in your development with mentorship, learning opportunities, and a clear path for advancement.

culture.title: Global Culture
culture.description: Join a diverse, bilingual team bridging US and China markets. Collaborate across cultures and time zones.

hiring.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 3 business days.

placeholders.name: e.g. John Doe
placeholders.message: Share your experience, skills, and what excites you about joining JY Tech...

hiring.successMessage: Thank you for your interest in joining JY Tech. Our team will review your application and get back to you within 3 business days.

metadata.title: JYTech | Elevate your business with the power of media and technologies
metadata.description: Unlock your business's full potential by leveraging the latest media trends and technological advancements. Enhance customer engagement with data-driven strategies, streamline operations with AI, and drive growth through personalized digital experiences.
